title: Soft-tier pending-graduations shard index repair complete
body: Claim 588cdf40 closed. Scope was pending-graduations active-shard indexing only: compacted the main register pointer to the 2026-05-24 napkin-tail shard, added that shard to pending-graduations/README, and updated the critical-drain plan to current strict-hard SOFT 20 evidence. Validation passed: Prettier, markdownlint, git diff --check, and strict-hard SOFT 20. No owner/PDR-gated due entries were promoted.
